text: Welcome to the Mirai STEM Cohort A coordination space. Please complete the onboarding survey linked in Materials and mark your school implementation date on the shared calendar by Friday.
Reminder: Q1 milestone report is due to the grant funder by October 15. Please upload your school-level data to the shared Drive folder by October 10 so we can compile the district summary.

Equity Audit Phase 2 kickoff: Our external evaluator will present the disaggregated data dashboard at Thursday's working group session. Please review the pre-read packet in Materials before attending.

Draft recommendations document has been posted for member review. Please add comments by January 30 so we can finalize the Board presentation. Superintendent Meade will present findings at the February 21 Board meeting.

FY2026-27 budget planning is now open. Please review the three scenario documents uploaded in Materials. The CFO will walk through assumptions at our February 10 session. All materials are confidential — do not forward.
Updated: Budget scenario analysis now includes the recommended $4.8M reduction pathway. Leadership team is asked to complete the priority survey by February 28 before the June Board work session.
Bargaining prep session 1 materials are posted. Please review the current salary schedule comparison and the CRUSD-EA initial proposals before Tuesday. These documents are protected — HR eyes only.
Update from Chief Negotiator: CRUSD-EA has submitted a counter-proposal on the salary increase clause. Revised talking points and BATNA analysis are now in Materials. Next session is March 18.
Welcome back to Year 2 of MTSS PD. This year we deepen our Tier 2 intervention data cycles. Your first assignment is the baseline implementation fidelity survey — please complete by December 12.

All staff must complete the Google Workspace onboarding modules before December 30. The Classroom and Meet modules are required; Drive and Gmail are recommended. Certificate of completion uploads to HR automatically.

Mirai STEM Cohort B planning is underway. The 8 schools invited to join the 2026-27 cohort have been notified. Please complete the school readiness assessment in Materials and return it to Tom Reilly by January 20.

Bell Schedule Redesign Committee: Thank you to all 31 principals who submitted feedback surveys. The compiled results are now posted. Our next working session will focus on the four finalist schedule models.

New SchoolMessenger templates for the 2025-26 year are now live. Please review the crisis communication protocol update in Materials — it includes new multilingual alert procedures for our Spanish, Vietnamese, and Somali families.
Network infrastructure project update: Bids from three vendors are in. The evaluation rubric and recommendation memo are posted. IT leadership will present to the superintendent on December 3.

Board members: The OSBA annual governance training modules are now available in the Materials section. All five board members are asked to complete Module 1 (Policy Authority) and Module 2 (Superintendent Evaluation) by November 15.
PAPEA Spring 2026 regional collaborative session 2 recording is now posted. The cross-district panel on restorative practices runs 45 minutes — highly recommended for principals and counselors.

Cedar Bluff HS SIP mid-year review: We are on track for 3 of our 5 goals. The Algebra proficiency goal requires an updated action plan by February 28. Please coordinate with the math department chair.

Welcome to CRUSD! All new employees hired on or after November 1 must complete the orientation course by their 30th day. Module 5 (Mandatory Reporter training) must be completed within your first week.
Mirai STEM grant: Q3 expenditure report is due to the Oregon Department of Education by November 30. Please upload your school-level budget actuals to the shared folder by November 21.

Counselor Collaborative April session: We will be reviewing the updated district-wide SEL assessment results. Breakout groups will draft school-specific Tier 2 mental health referral protocols. Attendance is mandatory for all 31 school counselors.

Dual Language PD: The Oregon Dept. of Education has approved our updated certification pathway. Teachers in years 1-3 must complete the new second language acquisition module by March 1 to maintain certification.
FERPA recertification is now open for 2025-26. All staff with PowerSchool or Google Workspace access must complete the 30-minute module by October 31. Completion is tracked automatically.

Reminder: FERPA recertification deadline is October 31. As of today, 312 of 2,800 staff members have not yet completed the module. Principals — please remind your teams. Non-compliance will result in access suspension.

CRT Year 1 cohort — thank you for an outstanding year. End-of-year reflection surveys are due by March 5. Your feedback will shape the Year 2 curriculum. Certificates of completion will be emailed by March 20.

Annual safety recertification is now open. All custodial, maintenance, and grounds staff must complete the four required modules by January 31. New this year: Module 4 covers updated OSHA hazard communication standards (HazCom 2025).
